meta.title: Ananda Wutwanna — IoT Imagineer · Automation & Integration
meta.description: IoT engineer building automation control platforms and system integrations — coordinating devices and robots over MQTT / Modbus, from edge firmware to the systems that orchestrate them.

hero.tagline: I analyze, design, and build systems across both the software and the hardware they control — from device control programs up to the platform that commands and monitors it all.

about.heading: I design and build systems across software and hardware.
about.body: An engineer who analyzes, designs, and builds systems around what they actually need to do. I like seeing the whole picture — working out what a job really needs, then building the pieces so they work together. I've worked both sides of it: on the hardware side, writing the programs that drive devices like stepper motors, motorized valves, and sensors and handling the communication between them; on the software side, building the frontend and backend, the APIs, and the platforms that command and monitor everything in real time. I can take a system from gathering requirements and designing the architecture, to writing the code, to installing and troubleshooting it on-site.

skills.heading: What I work with
skills.note: Built across protocols, integration, backend, firmware, and field commissioning.

projects.heading: Systems I've shipped
projects.note: Case studies from production deployments and lab work.

contact.heading: Open to IoT / embedded / automation roles — let's talk.
contact.body: If you're building devices, controllers, or the platforms that run them, I'd like to hear about it.
